'''gar''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:body|body]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-?-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:body|body]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæ?irith|gæ?irith]] || [[word:gæ?irij|gæ?irij]] || [[word:gæ?irish|gæ?irish]] || [[word:gæ?iri|gæ?iri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ga?u?uruth|ga?u?uruth]] || [[word:ga?u?uruj|ga?u?uruj]] || [[word:ga?u?urush|ga?u?urush]] || [[word:ga?u?uru|ga?u?uru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ga?uruth|ga?uruth]] || [[word:ga?uruj|ga?uruj]] || [[word:ga?urush|ga?urush]] || [[word:ga?uru|ga?uru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ga?ufrufth|ga?ufrufth]] || [[word:ga?ufrufj|ga?ufrufj]] || [[word:ga?ufrufsh|ga?ufrufsh]] || [[word:ga?ufruf|ga?ufruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæ?ereth|gæ?ereth]] || [[word:gæ?erej|gæ?erej]] || [[word:gæ?eresh|gæ?eresh]] || [[word:gæ?ere|gæ?ere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ga?o?oroth|ga?o?oroth]] || [[word:ga?o?oroj|ga?o?oroj]] || [[word:ga?o?orosh|ga?o?orosh]] || [[word:ga?o?oro|ga?o?oro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ga?oroth|ga?oroth]] || [[word:ga?oroj|ga?oroj]] || [[word:ga?orosh|ga?orosh]] || [[word:ga?oro|ga?oro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ga?ofrofth|ga?ofrofth]] || [[word:ga?ofrofj|ga?ofrofj]] || [[word:ga?ofrofsh|ga?ofrofsh]] || [[word:ga?ofrof|ga?ofrof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:ga?ïfrïfth|ga?ïfrïfth]] || [[word:ga?ïfrïfj|ga?ïfrïfj]] || [[word:ga?ïfrïfsh|ga?ïfrïfsh]] || [[word:ga?ïfrïf|ga?ïfrïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:ga?ïf?ïfrïfth|ga?ïf?ïfrïfth]] || [[word:ga?ïf?ïfrïfj|ga?ïf?ïfrïfj]] || [[word:ga?ïf?ïfrïfsh|ga?ïf?ïfrïfsh]] || [[word:ga?ïf?ïfrïf|ga?ïf?ïfrïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæ?æræth|gæ?æræth]] || [[word:gæ?æræj|gæ?æræj]] || [[word:gæ?æræsh|gæ?æræsh]] || [[word:gæ?æræ|gæ?æræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ga?a?arath|ga?a?arath]] || [[word:ga?a?araj|ga?a?araj]] || [[word:ga?a?arash|ga?a?arash]] || [[word:ga?a?ara|ga?a?ara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ga?arath|ga?arath]] || [[word:ga?araj|ga?araj]] || [[word:ga?arash|ga?arash]] || [[word:ga?ara|ga?ara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ga?afrafth|ga?afrafth]] || [[word:ga?afrafj|ga?afrafj]] || [[word:ga?afrafsh|ga?afrafsh]] || [[word:ga?afraf|ga?afraf]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ga?aratha|ga?aratha]] || [[word:ga?araja|ga?araja]] || [[word:ga?arasha|ga?arasha]] || [[word:ga?araka|ga?araka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ga?arath|ga?arath]] || [[word:ga?araj|ga?araj]] || [[word:ga?arash|ga?arash]] || [[word:ga?ara|ga?ara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ga?arathal|ga?arathal]] || [[word:ga?arajal|ga?arajal]] || [[word:ga?arashal|ga?arashal]] || [[word:ga?arakal|ga?arakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ga?araathatha|ga?araathatha]] || [[word:ga?araajaja|ga?araajaja]] || [[word:ga?araashasha|ga?araashasha]] || [[word:ga?araaka|ga?araaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ga?arathan|ga?arathan]] || [[word:ga?arajan|ga?arajan]] || [[word:ga?arashan|ga?arashan]] || [[word:ga?arakan|ga?arakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ga?arathaoro|ga?arathaoro]] || [[word:ga?arajaoro|ga?arajaoro]] || [[word:ga?arashaoro|ga?arashaoro]] || [[word:ga?arakaoro|ga?arakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|60977ac}}
